case_title: GLEN E COX VS. ROBIN JILL MORAN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF COX, GLEN E AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, ROBIN JILL AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
